'''Redeye''', nicknamed "'''Deadeye'''," was a member of the [[Turazza]] species who worked as head of security for [[Luskin Exovar]] at [[Exovar's Emporium]].

==Biography==
Redeye proved to be highly effective as the head of security and was able to single-handedly eject a pair of unruly [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] with only a [[Stun baton/Legends|stun baton]] and sheer force of will.

==Personality and traits==
His personality was mostly unknown as Emporium patrons were unable to communication with him, as he could not speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]]. Redeye was a nickname based upon his facial coloration and Deadeye was a nickname based upon his skill with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. His true Turraza name was known only to Luskin. He wore a patch over his missing right eye.

==Skills and abilities==
Despite his small size Redeye was a formidable opponent in combat and was equally skilled with a blaster as he was with his stun baton. He was also trained to use the [[EXVR-1 Guardian Grid|Ion Defense Grid]] that protected the Emporium. He was also highly perceptive and was able to spot or sniff out trouble before it occurred.

==Behind the scenes==
Redeye was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]].
